001package net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.api.buttons.customnumber;
002
003import net.kyori.adventure.text.Component;
004import net.okocraft.box.api.message.argument.SingleArgument;
005import net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.api.button.RefreshableButton;
006import net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.api.menu.Menu;
007import net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.api.session.CustomNumberHolder;
008import net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.api.util.TranslationUtil;
009import org.bukkit.Material;
010import org.bukkit.Sound;
011import org.bukkit.entity.Player;
012import org.bukkit.event.inventory.ClickType;
013import org.bukkit.inventory.meta.ItemMeta;
014import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
015import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
016
017import java.util.ArrayList;
018
019@SuppressWarnings("ClassCanBeRecord")
020public class IncreaseCustomNumberButton implements RefreshableButton {
021
022    private final CustomNumberHolder holder;
023    private final Component displayName;
024    private final SingleArgument<Integer> clickToSetLore;
025    private final SingleArgument<Integer> clickToIncreaseLore;
026    private final SingleArgument<Integer> currentAmountLore;
027    private final int slot;
028    private final Menu menuToUpdate;
029
030    public IncreaseCustomNumberButton(@NotNull CustomNumberHolder holder, @NotNull Component displayName,
031                                      @NotNull SingleArgument<Integer> clickToSetLore,
032                                      @NotNull SingleArgument<Integer> clickToIncreaseLore,
033                                      @NotNull SingleArgument<Integer> currentAmountLore,
034                                      int slot, @Nullable Menu menuToUpdate) {
035        this.holder = holder;
036        this.displayName = displayName;
037        this.clickToSetLore = clickToSetLore;
038        this.clickToIncreaseLore = clickToIncreaseLore;
039        this.currentAmountLore = currentAmountLore;
040        this.slot = slot;
041        this.menuToUpdate = menuToUpdate;
042    }
043
044    @Override
045    public @NotNull Material getIconMaterial() {
046        return Material.BLUE_STAINED_GLASS_PANE;
047    }
048
049    @Override
050    public int getIconAmount() {
051        return 1;
052    }
053
054    @Override
055    public @Nullable ItemMeta applyIconMeta(@NotNull Player viewer, @NotNull ItemMeta target) {
056        target.displayName(TranslationUtil.render(displayName, viewer));
057
058        var lore = new ArrayList<Component>();
059
060        var unit = holder.getUnit().getAmount();
061        var currentAmount = holder.getAmount();
062
063        lore.add(Component.empty());
064
065        if (unit != 1 && currentAmount == 1) {
066            lore.add(clickToSetLore.apply(unit));
067        } else {
068            lore.add(clickToIncreaseLore.apply(unit));
069        }
070
071        lore.add(Component.empty());
072
073        lore.add(currentAmountLore.apply(currentAmount));
074
075        target.lore(TranslationUtil.render(lore, viewer));
076
077        return target;
078    }
079
080    @Override
081    public int getSlot() {
082        return slot;
083    }
084
085    @Override
086    public void onClick(@NotNull Player clicker, @NotNull ClickType clickType) {
087        var unit = holder.getUnit();
088        var current = holder.getAmount();
089
090        if (current == 1 && unit.getAmount() != 1) {
091            holder.setAmount(unit.getAmount());
092        } else {
093            holder.increaseAmount();
094        }
095
096        clicker.playSound(clicker.getLocation(), Sound.BLOCK_WOODEN_BUTTON_CLICK_ON, 100f, 1.5f);
097
098        if (menuToUpdate != null) {
099            menuToUpdate.updateMenu(clicker);
100        }
101    }
102}
